licensing_attribution: CAIQ question content adapted from the Cloud Security Alliance (CSA) Consensus Assessments Initiative Questionnaire (CAIQ) v4.0.3, licensed CC BY 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/). Original publication: https://cloudsecurityalliance.org/research/cloud-controls-matrix/. The Evidentia caiq-lite template is a representative subset (~25 questions across the 17 CAIQ control domains); operators wanting the full 245-question CAIQ should download from CSA + use the planned `--from-template` BYO ingestion path.
description: Representative subset of the CSA Consensus Assessments Initiative Questionnaire v4.0.3. ~25 questions across the 17 CAIQ control domains. Use for cloud-provider + SaaS vendor DD where the full 245-question CAIQ would be excessive but CCM-aligned questions are valuable.

questions.question_text: Do you provide independent third-party audit reports (SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, PCI DSS, FedRAMP, or equivalent) covering the services you provide?
Do you map your security controls to industry frameworks (NIST 800-53, ISO 27001, CSA CCM)?
Do you have a documented Business Continuity / Disaster Recovery plan that is tested at least annually?
Do you maintain off-site backups of customer data and is restoration tested?
Are configuration changes to production systems formally reviewed + approved before implementation?
Is customer data encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard cryptographic algorithms?
Do you have a documented data classification scheme + apply it consistently to customer data?
Do you have a documented data-retention + secure-disposal policy that is applied to customer data on contract termination?
Are physical access controls (badge access, video surveillance, security personnel) maintained at all datacenters that store customer data?
Are encryption keys protected using a key-management service or hardware security module (HSM)?
Are encryption keys rotated on a documented cadence?
Is a formal Information Security Management System (ISMS) in place + maintained?
Are background checks performed on employees with access to customer data?
Is annual security awareness training mandatory for all employees + contractors?
Is multi-factor authentication enforced for all privileged accounts that can access customer data?
Are user access reviews performed at least quarterly?
Is access promptly revoked on employee termination or role change (specify SLA)?
Are network segmentation controls in place to isolate customer data from other tenants + management traffic?
Are vulnerability scans performed on production systems at least monthly + critical findings remediated within a documented SLA?
Do you have a documented incident-response plan + a contractual notification SLA for security incidents affecting customer data?
Do you flow down equivalent data-protection contractual terms to your sub-processors?
Are sub-processors who handle customer data disclosed to customers + reviewed at least annually for security posture?
Are antivirus / endpoint-detection-and-response controls deployed on systems with access to customer data?
Are mobile-device management controls enforced on devices that access customer data?
Are application security testing practices (SAST + DAST + SCA) integrated into your development lifecycle?
